testcase.name: Offline payment User level Subscribe "Quotation Request" plan with "active" status, user count "1" billing cycle "-" and get email user side

failure.message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_RESET (Session info: chrome=120.0.6099.227) Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '11.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [49d6d57ba6793ceca0cce689132358c5, get {url=https://sandbox.cubeforall.com/}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 120.0.6099.227, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 119.0.6045.105 (38c72552c5e..., userDataDir: C:\Users\ACER\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51682}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51682/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 120.0.6099.227, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 49d6d57ba6793ceca0cce689132358c5

testcase.failure:
